paper_title: The physical and chemical structure of Sagittarius B2. VI. UCHii regions in Sgr B2
mass_field_description: Literature reports ionizing stars in Sgr B2 UCHII regions span spectral types B0.5 to O6; use as region-level proxy evidence, not direct single-star mass.
